constraints: Always-on MetaBlooms governance is mandatory baseline governance; cartridge governance is additive.
Full OS export must include tracker-working baseline, quarantined FL17 progression, tracker lifecycle repair, and FL16/FL17 semantic authority.
Export PASS must be separated from promotion success.
ZIP validation must reject unsafe paths and pass integrity test.
Tracker state must be finalized after receipt/handoff and render compactly without box or pipe layout.
decision: Package full OS export and do not declare baseline promotion in this stage.
